VIN number 2g1fe1ed3b9147363
Part number 12635019

Hello again and thank you for your purchase and for the information! We will get the unit programmed and scheduled for shipping promptly.

A key relearn process is also required. Your vehicle will not start until this has been completed. Once the PCM has the VIN programmed and the key relearn process is completed the vehicle will start. 

A crankshaft and throttle relearn are also recommended when replacing the ECU. A scan tool is required to complete the crank and throttle relearn. Your vehicle may not run properly if these are not completed. You will need access to a scan tool capable of doing this procedure to do this and clear any related trouble codes (Code
P0315). Be sure your mechanic is capable of completing these before purchasing. The vehicle will run normal but the ”service engine soon” light will come on and a trouble code may be stored until this is resolved.

*We do not want to delay shipping your purchase so if we do not hear from you we assume the programming is being taken care of by your local locksmith or mechanic and we will ship the PCM. (Please make sure you are using the correct scan tool for programming or you could fry the computer and end up with a “no comm” situation.)

Over 33% of our buyers do not read this and buy the wrong part number!!!

DO NOT RELY ON EBAY'S FITMENT GUIDE OR THE GUARANTEED TO FIT PROGRAM!

**WARNING: We only use your VIN information for programming purposes. We do not run VIN interchange for you. Please make sure you are purchasing the correct part.

🚘🚘🚘 PLEASE ALSO BE SURE THAT YOU HAVE MATCHED YOUR PART NUMBER AND SERVICE NUMBER AS THESE ARE PART NUMBER AND SERVICE NUMBER SPECIFIC NOT VEHICLE SPECIFIC. 🚘🚘🚘

We appreciate your business!

YPS

Hello and thank you for your purchase, order 25-14391-78207

If you have already provided your VIN in the "Notes to Seller" during checkout and matched your part number and service number exactly per the listing description, you do not need to do that again. However, please keep reading as there is important information below!

We offer free VIN programming on the PCM purchased. If you would like to take advantage of this FREE service please email as soon as you can with your vehicle VIN. A key relearn process is also required. Your vehicle will not start until this has been completed. Once the PCM has the VIN programmed and the key relearn process is completed the vehicle will start. 

A crankshaft and throttle relearn are also recommended when replacing the ECU. A scan tool is required to complete the crank and throttle relearn. Your vehicle may not run properly if these are not completed. You will need access to a scan tool capable of doing this procedure to do this and clear any related trouble codes (Code P0315). Be sure your mechanic is capable of completing these before purchasing. The vehicle will run normal but the ”service engine soon” light will come on and a trouble code may be stored until this is resolved.

We do not want to delay shipping your purchase so if we do not hear from you we assume the programming is being taken care of by your local locksmith or mechanic and we will ship the PCM. Please make sure you are using the correct scan tool for programming or you could fry the computer and end up with a “no comm” situation.

DO NOT RELY ON EBAY'S FITMENT GUIDE OR THE GUARANTEED TO FIT PROGRAM!

WARNING: We only use your VIN information for programming purposes. We do not run VIN interchange for you. Please make sure you are purchasing the correct part.

🚘🚘🚘 PLEASE ALSO BE SURE THAT YOU HAVE MATCHED YOUR PART NUMBER AS THESE ARE PART NUMBER SPECIFIC NOT VEHICLE SPECIFIC. 🚘🚘🚘
